question: Does the image follow the specified layout: Fishbone diagram in the upper ~70%, and a split lower section (Table on left, Bar Chart on right)?
Does the Fishbone diagram have a horizontal spine extending left-to-right, ending in a rectangular box labeled 'EFFECT'?
Are there exactly 6 main bones connected to the spine, labeled A through F respectively?
Do the main bones alternate in direction starting with the 1st bone upward (Up, Down, Up...), angled at approximately 60°?
Does each main bone have exactly 2 sub-bones (tilted same direction) ending in small dots with no text?
Does the checklist table (lower left) have exactly 6 rows and 4 columns?
Are the table headers labeled H1-H4 and row titles labeled R1-R5?
Do the table cells contain hollow square checkboxes, with checks ONLY in the diagonal pattern (R1H1, R2H2, R3H3, R4H4, R5H1)?
Does the bar chart (lower right) contain exactly 8 vertical bars with coordinate axes and scale marks?
Are the bars labeled B1 through B8 below the x-axis?
Do the bars in the chart have uniform width and spacing?
Is the image limited to Black, Gray, and Blue colors only (no other colors)?
Is the image free of gradients and shadows (flat style)?
Does all text use only Latin letters and numbers (no non-Latin scripts)?
Are all text labels (EFFECT, A-F, H1-H4, R1-R5, B1-B8) clearly legible without garbling?
